revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{Commons|Category:Aridagawa, Wakayama}} 和歌山県有田郡[[有田川町]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:和歌山県の市町村|ありたかわち...'
ロボットによる: 文字置き換え (-{{commons|Category: +{{commonscat|)
Auto-generated page
revision.text: [[Category:Uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: r2.7.1) (ロボットによる: [[ko:분류:아리다가와 정]]を追加
revision.text:
{{commonscat|Aridagawa, Wakayama}} 和歌山県有田郡[[有田川町]]に関するカテゴリ。
[[Category:和歌山県の市町村|ありたかわちよう]]
[[ko:분류:아리다가와 정]]

revision.comment: ボット: 言語間リンク 1 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:Q9379055]] に転記
+cat
[[Category:2006年に成立した行政区画]]を除去; [[Category:2006年設置の日本の市町村]]を追加 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
1 revision imported: importing programmatically made stuff

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"

[[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{Portal|Japan}} {{Commons category|Aridagawa, Wakayama}} {{cat main}} [[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]][[Category:Towns in Wakayama Prefecture]] Category:Wikipedia categories named after pop...'
Text replacement - "[[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]]" to "[[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]][[Category:Tier_1_Categories_with_enwiki]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==English Content== {{Portal|Japan}} {{Commons category|Aridagawa, Wakayama}} {{cat main}}
[[commons:Category:Category:Aridagawa, Wakayama]] [[en:Category:Aridagawa, Wakayama]] [[en:Category:Aridagawa, Wakayama]] [[ja:Category:有田川町]] [[ko:Category:분류:아리다가와정]] [[zh:Category:Category:有田川町]]
==Local Content== [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]] [[Category:Tier_1_Categories_with_enwiki]] [[Category:Towns in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9379055)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9379055)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Portal|Japan}} {{Commons category|Aridagawa, Wakayama}} {{cat main}} {{wikidata link|Q9379055}} <!--interwikis--> [[co:commons:Category:Category:Aridagawa, Wakayama]] [[en:Category:Aridagawa, Wakayama]] [[ja:Category:有田川町]] [[ko:Category:분류:아리다가와정]] [[zh:Category:Category:有田川町]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]] [[Category:Tier_1_Categories_with_enwiki]] [[Category:Towns in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - ":Category:Category:" to ":Category:"
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Portal|Japan}} {{Commons category|Aridagawa, Wakayama}} {{cat main}} {{wikidata link|Q9379055}} <!--interwikis--> [[co:commons:Category:Aridagawa, Wakayama]] [[en:Category:Aridagawa, Wakayama]] [[ja:Category:有田川町]] [[ko:Category:분류:아리다가와정]] [[zh:Category:有田川町]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]] [[Category:Tier_1_Categories_with_enwiki]] [[Category:Towns in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23879003569|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Portal|Japan}} {{Commons category|Aridagawa, Wakayama}} {{cat main}} {{wikidata link|Q9379055}} <!--interwikis--> [[co:commons:Category:Aridagawa, Wakayama]] [[en:Category:Aridagawa, Wakayama]] [[ja:Category:有田川町]] [[ko:Category:분류:아리다가와정]] [[zh:Category:有田川町]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Tier_1_Categories_with_enwiki]] [[Category:Towns in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 5 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25460205297|commit triggered pipeline]]
